title: Swords And Skills | RPG Series
description: A modpack for adventurers who love combat and progression. Unlock abilities through a skill tree by defeating enemies and mastering swordplay and magic.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KFX3zFpe/images/5f366b756153ff098fa284fd026218f6fc5af468.jpeg)

# **Swords and Skills** 
Is a thrilling modpack designed for adventurers who love combat and progression. You need to level up the LevelZ tab to be able to farm, mine, and fight. Unlock powerful abilities through an engaging skill tree system by defeating enemies and mastering your swordplay. With a blend of enhanced weapon mechanics, detailed animations, and immersive RPG elements, this modpack transforms Minecraft into an epic journey of discovery and growth. Explore dungeons, gather loot, and customize your playstyle as you forge your path to greatness!

> # **Keybinds**
![Keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e395ef59c2835c1bb6dd35bbc5c2a0cedb6e8538.png)

> # Mods
![Preview](https://media1.tenor.com/m/6LItp4YycfUAAAAd/swords-and-skills.gif)
> # **Performance & Optimization Mods** 

- Sodium - Enhances performance and improves FPS.  
- Sodium Extra - Adds more settings and features for Sodium.  
- Lithium - Optimizes physics, AI, and block updates.  
- FerriteCore - Reduces RAM usage.  
- Exordium - Improves GUI rendering performance.  
- Krypton - Optimizes network performance.  
- Entity Culling - Hides unseen entities for better FPS.  
- More Culling - Further entity and block culling improvements.  
- ImmediatelyFast - Boosts UI rendering speed.  
- Memory Leak Fix - Fixes memory leaks to prevent slowdowns.  
- Fastload - Speeds up game loading.  
- Smooth Swapping - Improves hotbar swapping performance.  
- Dynamic Crosshair - Better and more efficient crosshair rendering.  

> # **Visual & UI Enhancements**

- Iris Shaders - Adds shader support.  
- LambDynamicLights - Dynamic lighting from entities and items.  
- Legendary Tooltips - Fancy tooltips with detailed item info.  
- Eating Animation - Adds better eating animations.  
- Chat Heads - Shows player heads next to chat messages.  
- Better Ping Display - Shows detailed ping info.  
- Zoomify - Smooth, adjustable zoom key.  
- Player Animator - New, smooth player animations.  
- Continuity - Better connected textures (CTM support).  
- Wavey Capes - Animated capes that move with physics.  
- Item Borders - Adds borders around held items.  
- First Person - Fully 3D first-person rendering.  
- Not Enough Animations - Brings missing animations to first person view.  
- BetterEnd Cities Vanilla - Better vanilla End Cities.  
- BetterEnd Cities for BetterEnd - Further enhancements with BetterEnd.  

> # **Gameplay Enhancements**

- AppleSkin - Displays hunger and saturation values.  
- Waystones - Adds teleportation between locations.  
- JourneyMap - Full-screen minimap and waypoints.  
- RightClickHarvest - Harvest crops with right-click.  
- Tree Harvester - Chop full trees with one block break.  
- Universal Graves / Graves - Save your inventory in a grave when you die.  
- SimplySneak - Better sneak behavior options.  
- Carry On - Pick up and move blocks and mobs.  
- Ping Wheel - Communication ping system.  
- RPG Inventory - Adds equipment slots like rings and belts.  
- Trinkets - Adds trinket equipment slots.  
- Cosmetic Armor - Wear cosmetic armor separately from functional armor.  
- Mouse Tweaks - Better inventory mouse control.  
- Concentration - Focus mechanic for certain weapons.  

> # **Combat & RPG Elements**

- Better Combat - Full combat system overhaul.  
- Simply Swords - Adds lots of new swords.  
- Archers (RPG Series) - Focus on archery and ranged weapons.  
- Wizards (RPG Series) - Magic spells and abilities.  
- Paladins & Priests (RPG Series) - Holy magic and buffs.  
- Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series) - Stealth and melee focused classes.  
- Runes - Adds magical runes for weapons and armor.  
- Spell Engine - Framework for casting spells.  
- Spell Power - Power scaling for magic spells.  
- Shield API - API for shield mechanics.  
- Simply Skills - RPG skill tree system.  
- Simply Skills No Limit Tree - Removes limit from the skill tree.  
- Pufferfish Attributes - Expands attribute systems.  
- Pufferfish Skills - Adds RPG skill systems.  
- Death Knights - RPG undead-themed additions.  
- Mythic Metals - Adds fantasy ores and materials.  
- Jewelry - Craft wearable magic jewelry.  

> # **World Generation & Exploration**

- When Dungeons Arise - Adds massive, explorable structures.  
- Dungeons and Taverns - Adds small dungeons and taverns.  
- Explorify - Adds new exploration structures.  
- Tectonic - Better terrain generation.  
- Terralith - Adds beautiful new biomes.  
- YUNG’s Mods (Bridges, Better Mineshafts, Better Dungeons, Strongholds, etc.) - Many improvements to world structures.  
- Small Ships - Adds pirate and merchant ships.  
- Tidal Towns - Adds coastal towns.  
- BetterEnd - Complete overhaul of the End dimension.  
- BetterEndDelight - Integration between BetterEnd and Farmer’s Delight.  
- Mythic Mounts - Adds ridable mythical creatures.  
- Stoneworks - Adds stone-themed structures.  
- Villages and Pillages - Better village generation.  
- True Ending - Improves End-game exploration.  
- Gazebos - Small decorative structures across the world.  
- Clear Despawn - Shows when mobs are about to despawn.  
- Let Me Despawn - Control despawn times better.  

> # **Utility & API Mods**

- Fabric API - Core mod for other mods to work.  
- Cloth Config API - Adds mod configuration menus.  
- Architectury API - Cross-platform modding support.  
- Forge Config API Port - Forge-style config support for Fabric.  
- libIPN - Library mod needed for some features.  
- Collective - Common functionality library.  
- JamLib - Support library for various mods.  
- Patchouli - Guidebook mod.  
- Silk API - Better interactions with blocks.  
- Slot Customization API - Expand inventory slots.  
- Structure Pool API - Adds support for complex structures.  
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) - Config screen library.  
- owo-lib - Utility library for animations and networking.  
- balm - Modding library (needed for Farmer’s Delight and others).  
- AttributeFix - Fixes attribute-related bugs.  
- Libz - Basic library used by some small mods.  

> # **Miscellaneous**

- Mod Menu - Easy mod list with config buttons.  
- Just Enough Items (JEI) - View crafting recipes.  
- Lootr - Better loot chest mechanics.  
- Essential Mod - Adds friends and multiplayer invites.  
- Passive Shield - Shields auto-activate when equipped.  
- Just Hammers - Adds hammer tools.  
- Do A Barrel Roll - Fun barrel roll effect mod.  
- Sophisticated Core (Unofficial Fabric Port) - Backend for Sophisticated mods.  
- Sophisticated Backpacks (Unofficial Fabric Port) - Adds customizable backpacks.  
- Smoke Suppression - Reduces annoying smoke effects.  
- BcLib - Required library for Better Combat mods.
